leadText: Pyro Ball (Japanese: かえんボール Flame Ball) is a damage-dealing Fire-type move introduced in Generation VIII. It is one of the signature moves of Cinderace.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Pyro Ball will thaw out the user if it is frozen , and then inflict damage on the target. Pyro Ball also has a 10% chance of burning the target. It has no effect on Pokémon with the Bulletproof Ability. Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl [ edit | edit source ] Pyro Ball cannot be selected in a battle.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh LA S V The user attacks by igniting a small stone and launching it as a fiery ball at the target. This may also leave the target with a burn. BD SP This move can't be used. It's recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can't be remembered.
